item.title: Kubernetes Tips
item.author: Author
item.description: Kubernetes Usage Config Alias in ~/.bashrc 1 2 3 alias k="kubectl" alias kc="kubectl config get-contexts" alias kn="kubectl config set-context --current --namespace" Output YAML in ~/.bashrc 1 export do="--dry-run=client -o=yaml" Vim Config in ~/.vimrc 1 2 3 set tabstop=2 set expandtab set shiftwidth=2 After editing *.service 1 systemctl daemon-reload StatefulSet 1 k get sts Kubernetes Resource Usage 1 2 k top node k top pod --container=true Manually Scheduling without Scheduler nodeName The nodeName field is for that.
